case_title: HILLARY A NEW VS. KRISTINA KO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW, HILLARY A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KO, KRISTINA PLAINTIFF MAY RECOVER DAMAGES FOR EITHER REDUCTION IN VALUE OR COST OF REPAIR. SINCE PLAINTIFF ALREADY HAS BEEN COMPENSATED FOR COST OF REPAIR HER CLAIM FOR REDUCED VALUE IS DENIED. THE COURT DENIES PLAINTIFF DAMAGES FOR PREPARATION AND NEGOTIATION OF HER CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NEW, HILLARY A AS TO DEFENDANT KO, KRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF NEW, HILLARY A
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW, HILLARY A SERVED FEB-06-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KO, KRISTINA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
